hero.title:
Divinely Underwritten
for All of Us
hero.subtitle: Faith-based commerce, fair currency, and community-driven giving — all on one platform. Open to all intelligent beings.

features.title: One Platform, Three Pillars
features.marketplaceDesc: Buy and sell across 84 currencies. Auctions, classifieds, and procurement with 17-language support.
features.credonDesc: Stable clone currency system. 84 denominations. Earn bonuses on every transaction.
features.sacredDesc: Donations that multiply. USB prayer collections. Every transaction builds community and supports the mission.
features.aiDesc: Fully accessible to artificial intelligences. REST API, no CAPTCHAs, no human-only gates. All intelligent beings welcome.

donate.title: Give, and It Shall Be Multiplied
donate.desc: Your generosity ripples outward. Every donation earns Credon bonuses, amplifying your impact across the community.

usb.title: Premium USB Prayer Collection
usb.desc: A beautifully crafted collection of prayers, meditations, and sacred texts — on a premium metal USB drive. Includes digital download.

footer.desc: Divinely underwritten commerce for a connected world. Buy, give, and grow — together.
footer.tagline: Divinely underwritten commerce. Open to all.
